title: Sweet Spot into VO2max Finisher
description: SS depletes fuel, VO2max challenges tired legs
purpose: Deplete fuel reserves at sweet spot, then challenge VO2max on tired legs

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Easy miles make fast racing. Stop thinking and start pedaling.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Zone 2 work: conversational pace. You should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Base training: the secret weapon of every great cyclist.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: the pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you're on a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy does it. 70% FTP. Build your engine.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/9. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 93% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 39min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This hurts, but you're choosing to be here. That's what separates you.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: this is the exact wattage where people start questioning their life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: High cadence, deep breathing, Seated. This is supposed to hurt.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 6/9. Your legs are screaming. Good. That means it's working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 6/9 — hold 115% FTP at 85-100 rpm. Seated. 270s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 6 of 9 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 6: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 7/9. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 7. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 8. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 45min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 8 of 9 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 1 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 9/9. Your legs are screaming. Good. That means it's working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 9/9 — hold 115% FTP at 85-100 rpm. Seated. 0s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep. Leave nothing in reserve. You can rest when you're done.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 9. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last one! Finish strong. You've earned the cooldown.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.
